items.content_snippet: **Anchor Discovery:** The system executes a semantic search via FAISS to identify top- $k$ "anchor nodes" that align with the query’s high-dimensional vector. 2. **Bounded Expansio
items.content:
**Anchor Discovery:**  The system executes a semantic search via FAISS to identify top- $k$  "anchor nodes" that align with the query’s high-dimensional vector.
2.  **Bounded Expansion:**  Starting from these anchors, the system performs a Breadth-First Search (BFS) outward to the hop depth defined in the Retrieval Plan. This builds a localized topology from Mind 1 substrates, integrating Knowledge Graphs and Lineage DAGs.

items.origin_id: C:\Users\jacob\Documents\_AppDesign\_LivePROJECTS\BDNeuralTranslationSUITE\_corpus_examples\tech_talks\The End of the Black Box_ How Pure Math is Recla.md
items.content_snippet: The technical heart of the project is a classical mathematical technique known as **Spectral Compression** . The pipeline begins with **NPMI (Normalized Pointwise Mutual Informatio
items.content:
The technical heart of the project is a classical mathematical technique known as  **Spectral Compression** . The pipeline begins with  **NPMI (Normalized Pointwise Mutual Information)**  to create what can be described as a  **"friction matrix."**
In this matrix, tokens that share a strong semantic association have "low friction," while unrelated tokens have high friction. The system then applies  **Truncated SVD (Singular Value Decomposition)**  to compress this massive, sparse association matrix into a dense, high-dimensional representation. This is the "elegant signal" at its finest: achieving dense semantic representation through pure matrix factorization without the overhead of a single transformer block.

retrieval_leg: FTS-only lexical retrieval over content nodes.
